action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 trained ViT-B/16 CLIP for 20 epochs with GCE+Mixup+SWA, achieving SWA val accuracy 55.9% on noisy validation set. This is near the theoretical maximum (~60%) given ~40% label noise in val set, indicating strong resistance to noisy labels and good generalization to clean patterns. Previous best test accuracy was 0.7636 (ConvNeXt+GCE+Mixup+SWA). This ViT model may surpass that. Analysis: No test evaluation yet; must submit eval promptly. Time remaining ~1.1h, 21 iterations. ViT training was successful and likely yields high test accuracy. Decision: Submit eval using the newly saved best checkpoint 'checkpoints/best_model.pt' to measure test accuracy.
